india_trends.title: Government extends minimum import price on Multi-Layer Paper Board till September 30
india_trends.summary: The government has extended the minimum import price (MIP) on virgin multi-layer paper board at ₹67,220 per metric tonne until September 30, 2026, according to an official notification.
